calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2025 Continued To May-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan Preciado Escobar Plaintiff/ Respondent
Warren Klein, Esq. appears on behalf of Sureshehandra Solanky Defendant/ Appellant

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Mr. Escobar Plaintiff/ Respondent testifies on his own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A: Six page document from Quality, Body and Fender Preliminary Estimate
Exhibit B: Video of incident
Exhibit C: Two page Report of Sales Used Vehicle Dated November 11, 2024
Exhibit D: Note from Andres Macias regarding 2017 Ford Focus

Mr. Klien testifies on behalf of Mr. Solanky Defendant/ Appellant.

The matter is contined to May 22, 2025 at 9am per the parties' request. The Court orders parties to send her an e-mail prior to May 22 indicating whether the parties have concluded their settlement and whether the defendant abandons his appeal. Upon confirmation, the Court will enter an order dismissing the appeal, as abandoned by appellant.

The parties are advised that exhibits may be picked up within 30 days after the decision has been issued or they will be destroyed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not reported, (305).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-01-2025 Set For Trial On May-01-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 305

Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Continued To May-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
